name: Okra-Shrimp Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, make a roux by stirring flour and oil until dark brown.
2. Add vegetables (celery, onion, bell pepper, shallots) to the pot and cook until wilted.
3. Fry okra in separate pan using remaining grease until most of the slime is gone.
4. Do not prepare the gumbo ahead of time.
5. Add shrimp to the vegetable mixture and cook until pink.
6. Add tomatoes and cook for about 5 minutes.
7. Incorporate cooked okra into the pot.
8. Simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, adding water as needed to reach your desired consistency.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Cook for approximately 1 1/2 hours.
11. Add oysters 5 minutes before serving. Serve with rice.
